lead.done: Thank you for your trust. Keep your reference for tracking.

confirm.whatsappBody: A WhatsApp conversation was opened with your order details. Our team will confirm payment (MoMo, Orange or other) with you.
confirm.cinetpayBody: Status updated from our server. If still pending, the webhook may finalize within a few minutes.
confirm.standardBody: Your order was recorded. Track progress from your account.
confirm.trackingHint: Track progress on the Delivery page with this code.

step1.heading: Address & contact
step1.lead: Phone used for delivery and MoMo / Orange validation. Data is also saved on this device for your next visit.
step1.addressPh: e.g. Kennedy Ave, blue building, 2nd floor
step1.landmarkPh: e.g. near Total station, green gate…

location.online: Video / phone / digital deliverables per provider.
location.shopProducts: Bring ID if the seller requires verification at pickup.
location.yorix: Yorix Delivery — confirm {{city}} is covered. Final fees at payment if catalog amount changes.
location.standard: Standard delivery coordinated by seller and partner couriers.

errors.loginRequired: Sign in required to complete checkout.
errors.addressIncomplete: Complete address and phone on the previous step.
errors.checkoutFailed: Could not complete checkout. Try again or contact Yorix on WhatsApp (+237 696 56 56 54).
